title: The Demon
writer: Buckleigh Fritz Oxford, William C. Beal, Alan James
actors: Jack Hoxie, Lola Todd, William Welsh
plot: Intending to wipe out a lawless gang of outlaws, Dane Gordon (Jack Hoxie), poses as an ex-convict and joins the gang. Complications arise when he falls in love with "Goldie" Fleming (Lola Todd), stenographer for the respected citi...
